Description:
Engagement Addendum – Amended 2023 Tax Return (1040X) for Ray’s Construction

This engagement covers the preparation and submission of IRS Form 1040X to amend the 2023 individual tax return for the owner of Ray’s Construction. This service is not included in the original service proposal and will be billed as a separate charge, though work will proceed immediately due to time sensitivity. Payment may be made at a later date, as agreed.

Scope of Work:

Review the originally filed 2023 Form 1040, including Schedule C.

Evaluate and correct errors or omissions that may have impacted the refund or liability, with the goal of recovering any overpaid taxes.

Request and reconcile supporting documentation (e.g., receipts, prior year depreciation).

Review the 2022 return to confirm depreciation accuracy and verify carryover consistency.

Update books accordingly to ensure 2024 financial data is clean and properly aligned.

Prepare for timely filing of the 2024 tax return, which is critical to support other filings.

Related Dependencies:

The 2024 return will support the application for the Worker’s Compensation Certificate and the RRMC (Registration of Responsible Managing Contractor), both of which are not included in the original proposal and will also be treated as separate billable items.

Timeline and Urgency:
Given the delay and sequential dependencies, this project is being prioritized. Client cooperation in providing necessary documents—including the originally filed 2023 return and any 2022 depreciation details—is essential to expedite completion and prevent further delays in regulatory compliance.
